highlights:
Senior Principal Data Architect at Lamb Weston - United States Remote
...
# Senior Principal Data Architect
...
## Lamb Weston
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Design and maintain enterprise data architecture standards leveraging Snowflake • Collaborate with SAP data teams to ensure seamless data ingestion from SAP and non-SAP sources • Develop scalable data modeling frameworks, including medallion architectures for enterprise data products • Establish data performance, cost optimization, and security standards across the Snowflake environment • Guide integration with Power BI and other analytics platforms for efficient data delivery • Mentor engineering teams on Snowflake data patterns, performance tuning, and governance best practices
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or related discipline • 10+ years of experience in data architecture with 5+ years focused on Snowflake and AWS ecosystems • Proficiency in SQL, data modeling (3NF, dimensional), and data integration tools such as Informatica or Matillion • Experience designing and optimizing Snowflake virtual warehouses, data shares, and secure views • Strong knowledge of medallion architecture, data governance, and cost management best practices
...

...
I was so fortunate to
...
in a great program with a great team! Mary Everett
...
Mary will graduate with her doctorate in computer science tomorrow and will begin postdoctoral research at the U of I Center for Intelligent Industrial Robotics, focusing on precision agriculture and artificial intelligence data analysis techniques. 

Read more about her unique journey from our Moscow campus to U of I Coeur d'Alene (thanks to research faculty John C. Shovic 🦾) at https://lnkd.in/g3mbMzk4 .
...
my very first
...
of graduate school, I blew up a robot (pictured). I accidentally reversed power and ground on an ultrasonic sensor, and his head started smoking.
...
While I thought my career in higher education would be over before it started, my major professor laughed it off (and then proceeded to start a "Crown of Destruction" award for such incidents). It was a good lesson in how failure is a necessary part of the journey to the actual solution.
...
Last week, I successfully defended my dissertation to get my PhD in computer science at the University of Idaho . On the way, there were many failures, some slightly more consequential than blowing up a small robot. But there were also successes. And lessons learned. And, more importantly, an incredible support network from my Vandal family and from the Coeur d'Alene community. I cannot overstate the impact of having a great major professor, a caring graduate committee, and the best graduate and undergraduate research team in the entire world. Even further back, I never would have made it here if my undergraduate student employer (the campus Biodiesel Education Program) hadn't taken a chance on hiring a business major and encouraging a love of engineering.
...
For the next couple years, I am moving into a postdoctoral research position where I get to continue working on embedded systems and artificial intelligence for precision agriculture and manufacturing. I'm also excited to serve as Associate Director for our Center for Intelligent Industrial Robotics. It has been a huge blessing to work with the UI community and I'm looking forward to what tomorrow brings. Go Vandals!

results.title: Lamb Weston AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. is a global leader in frozen potato processing that has strategically integrated artificial intelligence across its operations to enhance product quality, operational efficiency, and sustainability[1][2]. The company has implemented several AI initiatives, including a comprehensive project with HAI and Radboud University to develop advanced AI models for potato quality analysis using hyperspectral imaging and machine learning[1]. Additionally, Lamb Weston utilizes the HAI Cloud Platform to create intelligent factory dashboards that provide real-time KPI monitoring and process optimization at its production facilities[3]. The company has also appointed Benjamin Heselton as Chief Information Officer in May 2025, bringing extensive technology leadership experience to accelerate digital innovation and elevate global technology capabilities[4].
...
## AI Hiring Signals
...
Lamb Weston Job Postings Analysis
...
4.8%
...
AI Mention Rate
...
AI-Related Jobs
...
### Tech vs Non-Tech AI Requirements
...
Tech Roles (Engineering/Data) 5.0%
...
Non-Tech Roles 4.8%
...
AI skills requirements are limited across the organization, with only 4.8% of job postings mentioning AI. While Customer Service shows 100% AI mention rate, this represents only 1 job. The relatively low tech and non-tech AI mention rates suggest AI capabilities are not yet a widespread organizational priority in hiring.
...
Lamb Weston hiring Associate Engineer (Full Time | Multiple Location Options) in Kennewick, WA | LinkedIn Engineering/Tech
...
Search our Job Opportunities at Lamb Weston Engineering/Tech
...
Sr Principal Data Architect at Lamb Weston Engineering/Tech
...
Sr SAP Security Engineer at Lamb Weston Engineering/Tech
...
## AI Initiatives
...
### AI-Driven Potato Quality Analysis
...
Collaboration with HAI, Radboud University, and ISPT to develop advanced AI models for potato quality prediction
...
The initiative uses hyperspectral imaging combined with AI to make faster, more accurate quality predictions that identify raw-material variations early, boosting yields and reducing waste. AI-generated predictions and alerts appear directly in HAI dashboards used by operators for real-time decision making.
...
### HAI Cloud Data Platform Implementation
...
Real-time KPI dashboards and data-driven factory operations
...
Implementation of intelligent factory dashboards using the HAI Cloud Platform that consolidate data from Rockwell plant automation, SAP, and weighing scales. The system provides real-time visibility into KPIs including Recovery (potato yield) and LineRate (maximum output per hour), enabling operators to make quick process adjustments.
...
How is Lamb Weston using AI in potato processing?
...
Lamb Weston uses AI for quality prediction through hyperspectral imaging, real-time process optimization via intelligent dashboards, and supply chain optimization using predictive analytics to improve efficiency, reduce waste, and maintain consistent product quality.
...
The AI initiatives deliver faster and more accurate quality predictions, real-time process adjustments, reduced waste, improved sustainability through optimized resource usage, and enhanced operational efficiency across production facilities.
...
Benjamin Heselton was appointed as Chief Information Officer in May 2025 to lead the company's global technology strategy and serve as a critical point of contact between all areas of the company and technology execution.
...
The HAI Cloud Platform consolidates data from various sources including plant automation, SAP, and weighing scales to provide real-time KPI dashboards that help operators make quick process adjustments and optimize factory performance.
...
AI helps monitor and optimize resource usage including energy, water consumption, and potato utilization, while also reducing waste through better quality prediction and process control, supporting the company's sustainability objectives.

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/pascalbornet_artificialintelligence-ai-coding-activity-7425780624835321856-TCDF
...
Activity: Robert Carey liked this
...
Jensen Huang recently said he wants his engineers to spend 0% of their time coding.
...
At first, it sounds absurd — until you realize what he really means.
...
Coding is becoming automated.
...
The new value isn’t in typing instructions for machines…
...
…it’s in teaching machines what’s worth building.
...
Jensen’s message is clear:
...
The future belongs to engineers who understand systems, context, and creativity — not just syntax.
...
As AI takes over execution, human intelligence must rise to orchestration.
...
It’s not about writing code anymore.
...
It’s about writing the future.
...
What do you think — will the best engineers of 2026 still code, or will they design intelligence itself? #ArtificialIntelligence #AI #Coding #Technology #FutureOfWork #Leadership #Innovation #Automation #MachineLearning #AIandHumanity
...
Activity: Robert Carey liked this
...
One of my favorite Data and analytics posters on LinkedIn always points out that it's not about tools—it's about the business and data. I tend to agree. I  can geek out on the latest LLM, but the what and why always "beats out" the how.
...
All the tools and techniques in the world will not help the business without an understanding of its function and the problems it needs to solve. This may seem obvious, but there is a nuance.  The problem the business thinks it needs to solve may be a symptom and not a root cause.  It takes a deep understanding to be effective, and this takes time.
...
There are needed tools, foundations, and processes, but we get caught up in this relatively easy aspect and forget about the business side. It isn't always just the D&A team, either. Many vendors fall into this trap, selling a tool that, by itself, isn't useful to the business.
...
My team and I have been working with great vendors, but what makes them great isn't their technical solutions (which are awesome) but their focus on trying to understand the business.  My roadmap from low maturity to peer (using the Gartner Maturity Model) has already improved by six months because of the great teams involved!  Thank you!

results.title: Senior Data Scientist – Generative AI at Minerva Foods - Brazil Remote
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist – Generative AI at Minerva Foods - Brazil Remote
...
Minerva Foods is a leading South American producer and exporter of fresh meat and meat-derived products, with more than 30 years of experience in the production and commercialization of beef, lamb and processed meat lines. The company operates across the full value chain — from relationships with cattle ranchers and traceability programs to industrial processing, branded products, retail and foodservice channels, and export markets — and also maintains related businesses including biodiesel, leather, casings, ingredients and energy. Minerva emphasizes sustainability, animal welfare, low-carbon and carbon-neutral product lines, and corporate governance and investor relations.
...
# Senior Data Scientist – Generative AI
...
🇧🇷 Brazil – Remote
...
⏰ Full Time
...
📊 Data Scientist
...
🗣️🇧🇷🇵🇹 Portuguese Required
...
Minerva Foods is a leading South American producer and exporter of fresh meat and meat-derived products, with more than 30 years of experience in the production and commercialization of beef, lamb and processed meat lines. The company operates across the full value chain — from relationships with cattle ranchers and traceability programs to industrial processing, branded products, retail and foodservice channels, and export markets — and also maintains related businesses including biodiesel, leather, casings, ingredients and energy. Minerva emphasizes sustainability, animal welfare, low-carbon and carbon-neutral product lines, and corporate governance and investor relations.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Develop solutions and agents based on large language models (LLMs) for integration into the company's products, processes, and services; • Perform fine-tuning and customization of pre-trained models; • Design and implement data pipelines for model training and evaluation, including preprocessing, tokenization, and dataset curation; • Integrate generative AI models with corporate systems, APIs, and business workflows; • Explore and apply RAG (retrieval-augmented generation), embeddings, and hybrid architectures; • Monitor and evaluate model performance using appropriate metrics; • Propose continuous improvements to the systems;
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Systems, Mathematics, Statistics, or related fields; • Postgraduate degree, MBA, or Master's in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, or Cognitive Computing (preferred); • Knowledge of language models, including their limitations and capabilities; • Proficiency in Python; • Familiarity with the AI model lifecycle: development, deployment, and monitoring; • Proficiency with version control tools; • Strong communication skills to explain technical approaches to non-technical audiences;
...
### 🏖️ Benefits
...
• Remote work • Proactivity, curiosity, and continuous learning • Opportunity to develop solutions based on natural language models • Integration of generative AI models into corporate systems

# Senior, Data Scientist
...
Sunnyvale, CAHybridSeniorML / AI
...
Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.
...
About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.

...
- Hands-on experience with Generative AI technologies: LLMs, multimodal models, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA)
...
- Prior Experience in building GenAI, DL, Vision-based models.
...
- Strong foundation in classical ML, deep learning, and modern architectures — CNNs, Transformers, and domain-specific variants
...
Mandatory Skills: Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Deep-learning, Python, GenAI Additional Qualifications: Good to have experience in areas such as LLM Optimization.

results.title: Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.
...
- Build and deploy production ML systems end-to-end: data pipelines, feature stores, model training, serving layers, monitoring, and feedback loops at scale
...
- Provide technical visionand lead advanced development in agentic AI, reinforcement learning, and simulation.
...
- Architect and deploy large-scale AI systems and autonomous AI agents — conversational assistants, predictive agents with tool-calling, and multi-agent orchestration systems using LangChain, Pydantic AI, and RAG patterns
...
- Deploy NLP pipelines at enterprise scale — semantic similarity across millions of records using BERT/SBERT embeddings and vector search (FAISS)
...
- Deep expertise in ML algorithms (XGBoost, CatBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest, AutoML) and deep learning (PyTorch, transformer architectures).
...
- Production experience with NLP (BERT, SBERT, FAISS, RAG), computer vision (YOLO, CLIP), and time series forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet).
...
- Hands-on experience building and orchestrating multiple AI agents with LangChain, RAG, tool integration, and memory management.
...
- Multi-cloud ML platform proficiency — AWS SageMaker AND GCP (Vertex AI, BigQuery, BigQuery ML).
...
- Strong Python skills (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn) with containerization (Docker) and MLOps practices.
...
- Masters degree in Statistics, Economics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field AND 8+ years’ experience in data science or Machine Learning roles with demonstrated impact.
...
- PhD in AI, Machine Learning, Computer Science, Information Technology, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Econometrics, or related field with relevant industry experience.

We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.

This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
